name: NerdyData
description: Search engine for source code across the public web Tool: https://nerdydata.com. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #1135 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map NerdyData output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
